creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
New port for ude (0.2.7-BETA, port 0.2.7.1).
Port notes:
	1) USE_LIBTOOL not needed yet since there are no
	   libraries to install.
	2) Took care of where it installed docs.
	3) Removed internal intl dependency so it installs
	   the gettext port and uses that instead.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the shar below to import the new port to the tree.
